seo.title: Ethan & Sons Electricians | Best Electrician in Addison, TX
seo.description: Ethan & Sons Electricians in Addison, TX offers expert electrical services: panel upgrades, wiring, lighting, and more. Licensed, insured, and family-owned. Call (469) 425-8874.

hero.headline: Reliable Electrical Services in Addison, TX
hero.subheadline: From panel upgrades to smart lighting, our licensed electricians deliver safe, code-compliant solutions with honest pricing.

featureSections.title: Code-Compliant Electrical Work You Can Trust
featureSections.body: Every job we do meets or exceeds local codes. We take the time to inspect, test, and verify — so your home stays safe and your system runs efficiently.
featureSections.cardBody: We back our work with a full satisfaction guarantee. If something isn’t right, we’ll make it right — no questions asked.

featureSections.title: Smart Home & Energy-Efficient Upgrades
featureSections.body: Bring your home into the future with smart switches, dimmers, and energy-saving fixtures. We help you reduce your bill and increase convenience.
featureSections.cardBody: Our energy audits identify waste and recommend upgrades that pay for themselves over time.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: We carry full liability and workers’ comp insurance, plus a valid Texas electrical license. Your property is protected.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. We provide a detailed written estimate before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: On-Time Arrival
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your schedule. Our technicians arrive within the promised window and communicate if delays occur.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We treat your home with care — wearing booties, using drop cloths, and cleaning up thoroughly after every job.

testimonials.quote: Ethan & Sons rewired our entire 1950s home. They were punctual, professional, and left every room spotless. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We needed an emergency panel replacement on a Saturday. They came out within an hour and had us back up and running. Fair price, too.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: Installed smart switches and dimmers throughout our house. The team explained everything and made sure we knew how to use them. Great experience!
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Call us or fill out our form for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From small repairs to full rewires, Ethan & Sons Electricians offers a full range of electrical services in Addison, TX. Our licensed technicians bring years of experience and a commitment to quality on every job.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your breaker panel for safety and capacity.
services.longDescription: Older panels can’t handle modern loads. We replace outdated fuse boxes and breaker panels with code-compliant units that support today’s appliances and electronics.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We assess your current panel and load requirements.

process.title: Permit & Prep
process.description: We handle all permits and prepare the site for a safe installation.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We replace the panel, test all circuits, and clean up.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Signs include flickering lights, frequent breaker trips, and using many high-wattage devices.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential upgrades are completed in 4–8 hours.

services.title: Whole-Home Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Replace old, unsafe wiring throughout your home.
services.longDescription: Homes with outdated wiring (knob-and-tube, aluminum, or degraded Romex) pose serious risks. We completely rewire your home to modern standards, ensuring safety and reliability.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We inspect the existing wiring and create a detailed plan.

process.title: Rough-In
process.description: We run new cables, install boxes, and prepare for drywall repair.

process.title: Finish & Test
process.description: We connect fixtures, outlets, and switches, then test every circuit.

faqs.question: Will rewiring damage my walls?
faqs.answer: Some access holes are necessary, but we work with your drywall contractor to minimize damage.

faqs.question: How long does a full rewire take?
faqs.answer: A typical 2,000 sq ft home takes 3–5 days.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.longDescription: Enhance your home’s ambiance and security with custom lighting. We install recessed lights, chandeliers, landscape lighting, and smart controls.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision and recommend fixtures and placement.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We wire and mount all fixtures, ensuring proper support and connections.

process.title: Testing
process.description: We test every light and demonstrate controls.

faqs.question: Do you install outdoor lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install landscape, security, and patio lighting.

faqs.question: Can I control my lights with my phone?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We install smart switches and hubs for app control.

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting & Repair
services.shortDescription: Diagnose and fix electrical issues fast.
services.longDescription: From dead outlets to flickering lights, we pinpoint the root cause and make lasting repairs. Our diagnostic process saves you time and money.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We use specialized tools to locate the problem.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We fix or replace faulty components.

process.title: Verification
process.description: We test the circuit to ensure everything works properly.

faqs.question: Why do my lights flicker?
faqs.answer: Causes include loose connections, overloaded circuits, or faulty fixtures. We can identify and fix the issue.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide same-day emergency service for urgent issues.

about.headline: Your Addison Electrical Experts
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services to Addison homeowners — with transparency and respect.
story: Ethan & Sons Electricians started as a small family operation in Addison over 15 years ago. What began with Ethan working out of his truck has grown into a trusted local business serving hundreds of homes. We believe in doing the job right the first time, treating every home like our own, and never cutting corners.

Today, our team of licensed electricians continues that tradition. We invest in ongoing training, use top-quality materials, and stand behind our work. Whether it’s a simple outlet repair or a full home rewire, we bring the same dedication to every project.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety — for our team or your family.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We give honest advice and fair pricing, every time.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in clean, precise work that lasts.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support Addison and its residents as neighbors.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out our form for a free estimate.
